SECURITY · ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS

Operated by Tamazia Ltd, a private limited company registered in England and Wales. Data Controller contact: dpo@tamazia.co.uk.

Researchers we thank

Last updated 4 May 2026.

This page lists researchers who have reported confirmed vulnerabilities to Tamazia under our coordinated disclosure policy, with their consent. We are grateful for the work that strengthens our handling of regulated client data.

2026

None reported yet.

Becoming listed

If you reported an issue and would like to be added, reply to the acknowledgement email with the name or handle you would like shown. We do not list researchers by default.

REGULATORY BRIEFINGS

Receive a quarterly briefing on regulatory developments affecting your sector. No marketing, no sales. Findings only.

By submitting you consent to receive regulatory briefings from Tamazia. Unsubscribe at any time. No marketing or sales content.
